## SafeMe PR checklist

- [ ] I did not change event handlers unless required
- [ ] I did not change PWA/cache logic unless required
- [ ] I tested mobile navigation
- [ ] I tested Contacts add button
- [ ] I tested Profile accordions
- [ ] I tested Settings accordions
- [ ] I tested SOS in test mode
- [ ] I ran npm run build
- [ ] I ran node --check src/main.js
